{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201530505C9F8BA1EFB1A0C88DCA"}"},"total":44},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7607460544787596056","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"情节有趣，搞笑，而且有肉吃，希望一直更下去"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771253137,"group_id":"7596545423142046745","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"错的不是我，而是世界又双叒叕错了","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9ti47Y6aHq5nrI84rTjlKw=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d507d982977641b9af62572020c8d5da~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776530542&x-signature=nT9CyhnZymxgQyjYd65OJnQ8KZk%3D","user_id":"86518835895","user_name":"陈雨欣的血肉"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"86518835895","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7596545423142046745","book_info":{"abstract":"【迪化脑补】+【反套路】+【搞笑】
苏澈穿越十八年，本是正道大师兄，却被一群系统挂逼偷走气运。 
天道登门求救，苏澈反手勒索气运洞察权限，开启收割蛀虫之路！ 
本想做一个安静的清道夫，奈何全宗门都是脑补帝！
尤其是那位化神师尊洛千霜，表面威严，背地里却是个超级恋爱脑，一心只想让他做道侣！ 
“徒儿，这宗主之位给你，你从了为师好不好？” 
他闲来无事喝口万年冰髓美容养颜， 迷妹月曦哭得梨花带雨：“师兄！别再为宗门燃烧寿元了，曦儿心疼！”
他随手丢给师弟一本摔跤图册， 师弟林凡热泪盈眶：“大师兄传我强人锁男无上大道！我要去猪圈证道！”
最离谱的是，当他抓获穿越者，被长老强行搜魂时，看着记忆中的高楼大厦、钢铁洪流、以及对着发光屏幕献祭的画面……
修真界大能当场吓尿：“这……这是何等恐怖的钢铁魔域！这魔头竟然来自这种禁忌之地？！”
苏澈无奈摊手：求求你们别脑补了，还有师尊，请自重！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/a2216f03b27fc1155632488c2d843b6f","author":"82年的大雪碧","author_id":"","book_id":"7596545423142046745","book_name":"玄幻：我的师弟全是天命大冤种！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":843,"name":"迪化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=843&name=迪化&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7596545681569890841","read_count":"11078","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"255305"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"111","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,穿越,多女主,搞笑轻松,迪化","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d47855476e2818eb3dfa1833f2d030b1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779175850&x-signature=WS8iEdSFd4HN7%2B7U184fMGm%2F1HU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"571344575536264","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"63"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201530505C9F8BA1EFB1A0C88DCA"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_coun
